case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DILEK SEZEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 15026091) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $310. The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
